cafe.description: Regulars at the corner café each ordered a different drink and a different pastry one busy morning. Work out who had what.

Viper goes with exactly four of Orin, Tiefling, Dagger, Divination, and 60 gp.

chess.name: The Chess Club
chess.description: Regulars at the chess club each swear by a different opening, a favourite tactic, and a prized set. Work out who plays what.
clues: Marble goes with either Arabian or 1500 (but not both).
Discovery, Gambit, and Zwischenzug go with Judit, Boxwood, and Maple, in some order.
Between Italian and Slav, one goes with Anatoly and the other with Judit.
The player known for the Arabian mate's rating is lower than both Nadia and the London player.
Exactly one of these is true: Judit goes with 1450; Maple goes with Hook; Marble goes with 1400.
Boris goes with at least four of London, Discovery, Boxwood, Back-rank, and 1500.
Damiano's goes with exactly four of Judit, Slav, Gambit, Boxwood, and 1550.
Either Arabian goes with 1450 or Hook goes with Zwischenzug.
